what_was_built: reports/arbitrage_research_readiness_gate_v1/readiness_gate.md (human-readable: 6-artifact audit + required artifact checks + validator checks + safety checks + allowed/forbidden next steps + data-collection/backtest/trading gates + PASS/WATCH/BLOCKED/PARKED rules + lane recommendation + safety boundaries)
tools/arbitrage_readiness_gate_check.py (stdlib-only validator with path-existence check; validate / show CLI)
tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py: new STATUS_KEYWORDS rule (readiness_gate -> WATCH/MIXED) + extra_files extended with the gate docs; arbitrage lane now classifies as WATCH (foundation complete)

6 prior arbitrage test files: tightened invariant from `arb['status']==IDEA` to `arb['status'] in (IDEA, WATCH)` so they keep enforcing 'never ACTIVE / never STRONG' while permitting the legitimate Bundle-10 promotion to WATCH

what_readiness_gate_decides.rationale: Foundation specification is COMPLETE. All 6 arbitrage docs exist, all 8 validators pass, all execution / fetch / connection / backtest / dataset-processing flags pinned False. No data, no QA report, no tested edge, no evidence. WATCH is the only honest verdict.

final_arbitrage_foundation_status: complete-at-specification-level / research-monitorable / NOT cleared for data collection / NOT cleared for backtest / EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN for paper or live trading

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: A price gap is not profit

tests_run.command: python -m pytest tests/test_arbitrage_readiness_gate.py tests/test_arbitrage_sample_dataset_plan.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_source_evaluation.py tests/test_arbitrage_qa_harness_spec.py tests/test_arbitrage_dataset_manifest.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_contract.py tests/test_arbitrage_research_protocol.py tests/test_strategy_candidate_registry.py tests/test_strategy_next_bundle.py --rootdir=tests -q

guardrails_held: never STRONG evidence in the auto-build path

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Deterministic logic NOT artificially modified. The WATCH bonus (+15) from the Bundle-3 registry-aware scoring actually raises arbitrage's score, so it remains the top deterministic pick. This is honest behaviour, NOT a recommendation. Operator should consult the readiness gate's `lane_recommendation` section -- which forbids ACTIVE promotion and recommends pivoting to a different lane or authoring a data-collection draft -- for the actual next step.

how_this_closes_the_arbitrage_foundation: Seven bundles (Bundle 4 protocol -> Bundle 5 data contract -> Bundle 6 dataset manifest -> Bundle 7 QA harness spec -> Bundle 8 data source evaluation -> Bundle 9 sample dataset plan -> Bundle 10 readiness gate).
Six specifications + one readiness gate = research-monitorable foundation.
Zero data pulled, zero backtests run, zero exchange connections, zero credentials, zero JARVIS/dashboard touch, zero paper/live execution touch, zero sealed-artifact touch.
recommended_next_non_arbitrage_bundle: Crypto-D1 Protocol Memo (alternative lane, currently PARKED; new hypothesis required, not a re-tune)
Arbitrage Data Collection Authorization Draft (still spec-only; only if operator wants to move the arbitrage lane past WATCH)
Data QA / Freeze workflow (cross-cutting; benefits multiple research lanes)
